title: Sessionise the event stream
prompt: Group each user’s events into sessions: a new session starts whenever the gap since their previous event is more than 30 minutes. Return each user_id and their number of sessions, ordered by user_id. (A user’s first event always starts a session.)

generic: LAG(event_at) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY event_at, event_id),
OR LAG(event_at) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY event_at, event_id) IS NULL

hints: Use LAG(event_at) per user (ordered by time) to get the previous event time.
Flag a new session when the gap > 30 minutes OR there is no previous event, then SUM the flags.
